title: Cnutty, Csnappyr Boudin Blanc Bamboo-Steamer Wrap
description: A low-carb Egyptian-inspired solo-dinner dish featuring boudin-blanc wrapped in a bamboo steamer for added crunch and texture.

ingredients.name: Peanut Oil
ingredients.notes: Lightly for pan-frying boudin if needed

instructions: Heat peanut oil in a bamboo steamer and lightly fry the boudin on both sides until golden brown.
Season with salt and herbs, wrapping each piece of boudin in the bamboo steamers for added texture.
Serve hot as a light meal or snack.
Optional: serve with a side of cucumber relish for additional flavor.
